# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe what changed and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Test coverage
- [ ] Architecture decision

## Verification

- [ ] `cargo test -- --test-threads=1`
- [ ] `cargo clippy --all-targets`
- [ ] Not applicable because this is documentation-only

## Notes

Mention any follow-up work, limitations, or behavior changes reviewers should
know about.
